name: Fujifilm XF 56mm F1.2 R
description: The Fujifilm XF 56mm f/1.2 R Lens is a prime portrait-length lens that provides a 35mm-equivalent focal length of 85mm when used with Fujifilm APS-C-sized mirrorless digital cameras.

features.Key Features:: Fujifilm X-Mount | 85mm (35mm Equivalent) | Aperture Range: f/1.2 to f/16 | One Double-Sided Aspherical Element | Two Extra-Low Dispersion Elements | HT-EBC Multi-Layer Lens Coating | Additional Coating on Front Element | High Speed AF
features.What's in the box?: Included: | 1x FUJIFILM XF 56mm f/1.2 R Lens | 1x Front Lens Cap | 1x Rear Lens Cap | 1x Lens Hood | 1x Cloth Wrap
